settings.brand_featured_text:
Indulge in the sensorial color-protecting Vitamino Color A-OX to get instantly soft and vibrant hair
The L'Oreal Professionnel Vitamino Color A-OX range is enriched with a powerful anti-oxidant complex and UV filters to prevent color fading and maintain the beauty of hair color

settings.section-heading: Explore the 3-Step Routine for Vibrant Colored Hair
settings.section-sub-heading: The L'Oreal Professionnel Vitamino Color A-OX range is enriched with a powerful anti-oxidant complex and UV filters to prevent color-fading and maintain the beauty of hair color

settings.description_1:
L'Oréal Serie Expert Vitamino Color Shampoo
A gentle daily cleanser for color-treated hair that helps prolong color radiance
settings.description_2:
L'Oréal Serie Expert Vitamino Color Masque
A lightweight mask that targets and deeply nourishes the damaged areas of color- treated hair for prolonged radiance
settings.description_3:
L'Oréal Serie Expert Vitamino Color 10-in-1 Spray
A finishing spray that helps prolong color radiance of dry, color treated hair
